titleStmt.title: SII 39.71: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 71. (A.R. No. 71 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌḶANĀTH TEMPLE-ON THE EAST WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE. •••••••••• 17TH YEAR AND 185TH DAY.

summary.p: This inscription refers to the gift of village Mañjaṉēri in Pūṅguṉṟanāḍu after purchase from somebody and given as offerings to the deity of Kūttāḍuvār, which was set up in the temple of Śivadharmīśvaramuḍaiya nāyaṉār at Tirukkōlakkuḍi by Sēmāṇḍār, the younger brother of Akaḷaṅganāḍāḻvār and further it states that at the instance of Kālingarāyaṉ, the above cited granted village was made taxfree by the king, when he was encamping at Gaṅgaikoṇḍapaṭṭiṉam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī yāṇṭu 10 7 vatunāḷ
100 8 10 5 kaṅkaikoṇṭa paṭṭaṇattil Eḻu
ntaruḷiyirukka niṉaippu puṟamalai nāṭṭu
tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiyār śivadharmmi
śvaramuṭaiyaṉāyaṉar tirukkoyilil Akaḷa
ṅka nāṭāḻvār tampi cemāṇṭār Eḻu
ntaruḷivitta kūttāṭuvāṟkut tiruppaṭi
māṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷuk
kuc cemāṇṭār nakularāyaṉ pakkal Ik
koyil caṇṭeśvaratevar tirunāmattāl vi
lai koṇṭa pūṅkuṉṟa nāṭṭu mañcaṉeri vilai
yolaippaṭi nāṉkellaikkuḷpaṭṭa nirnilamuṅ karu
ñcey puṉceyum nattamun toṭṭamuṅ kuḷamuṅ kuḷappa
kaṭamaiyum Antarāyamum viṉi
yokamum tiru Accum kāriyavārāṭciyum veṭṭipāṭṭamu
pañcupili cantuvikkirakappeṟum vācalpeṟum Ilāñcaṉaip
peṟum taṟiyiṟaiyum cekkiṟaiyum taṭṭaḷipāṭṭamum Iṭaiyarvariyu
Iṉavariyum ciṟṟāyamum poṉvariyum maṟṟum Epperpaṭṭaṉavum Uṭ paṭa
patiṉoṉṟāvatu mutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭappeṟa veṇu
meṉṟu kāliṅkarāyar namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ittiru
kkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiyār śivadharmmiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār tirukkoyili(l)
Akaḷaṅka nāṭāḻvār tampi cemāṇṭār Eḻuntaruḷivitta kū
ttūruvāṟkut tippaṭimā ṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷu
kku cemāṇṭār nakularāṉ pakkal Ikkoyil caṇṭeśvara
tevar tirunāmattāl vilaikoṇṭa pūṅkuṉṟa nāṭṭu mañcaṟai
ri vilaiyolaippaṭi nāṉkollaikkuḷpaṭṭa nirnilamum karuñce
y puṉceyum nattamum toṭṭamum kuḷamum kuḷapparippum Uṭpaṭ(ṭa)
kkaṭamaiyum Antarāyamum viṉiyokamum ta Accum kā
riya vārāṭciyum veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcupili cantuvikkirakap
peṟum vācalppeṟum Ilāñcuṉaippeṟum taṟiyiṟaiyum
yamum poṉvariyum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭaṉavum (uṭ)paṭa Ivvāṇ
ṭu mutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyākavum Ippaṭi cantirātitta(r) vaṟ
celvatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭikko
Digital edition of SII 39.71 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
